text:
the package does not seem to create some links which are required
	to run the programs. More specifically, there are no
	"tex", "latex" (which should be linked to "virtex" ?)
	no "mf" (which should be linked to "virmf" ?)
	and no "kpsewhich" (unknown to me...)
